title: Reverse Mountain Swallows the Straw Hats
main_description: The crew reaches Reverse Mountain and is dragged into the impossible currents that lead to the Grand Line. The reviewed chapter file is organized into display-ready story parts with cleaned dialogue and context-based speaker names.
key_events: The Crew Enters the Climbing Current
The Grand Line Reveals Its Monsters
The Canal to the Five Seas
Luffy Saves the Ship at the Summit
